sections.paragraph:
Original: לוי לויּי

Transliteration: lêvı̂yı̂y lêvı̂y

Phonetic: lay-vee-ee'

BDB Definition:

Levite = see Levi " joined to"
  1. the descendants of Levi, the 3rd son of Jacob by Leah
    1. the tribe descended from Levi specially set aside by God for His service

Origin: patronymically from H3878

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
